merriment-social.name: Merriment Social
highlights: Strong event/private dining reputation (wedding rehearsal dinner praise)

third-coast.name: Third Coast Provisions

flags.issue: Solo diner ignored by bartender for 45 min; food too salty (potholes dish). Service bias against solo diners.

highlights: Seafood and small plates generally well received
Service inconsistency flagged for solo diners
Saltiness mentioned in multiple reviews (steak tartar, scallops, potholes)

flourchild.name: Flourchild Pizza

flags.issue: Crust described as dry/stale, sauce lacking flavor. Price-to-quality concern.

highlights: Atmosphere, vibe, and music consistently praised
Crab Rangoon Spring Rolls frequently mentioned as a standout
King Cheese pizza getting multiple strong mentions
One negative review specifically about crust quality — worth monitoring

loon-room.name: The Loon Room
highlights: Valentine's Day special 4-star — charcuterie and entree flexibility could improve
Bartender names mentioned positively: Ethan, Mitchell, Majir

summary: No new low-rating reviews detected since last run. Two previously-flagged ≤2-star reviews persist (Third Coast: Korinne Mack / solo service bias; Flourchild: Jim Whitaker / crust quality). All venues holding stable ratings. Loon Room leading at 4.7 overall.
